# Requester views must combine policy.yaml and local/access.yaml, while keeping
# missing rough values conservative.
env HOME=$WORK/home DOSS_HOME=$WORK/vault
mkdir $HOME
exec $DOSS init --no-connect --git-name 'Test Owner' --git-email owner@example.com

# Policy gives Pedro rough access to address, full access to dietary, and rough
# access to a fact that intentionally has no rough value.
cp policy.yaml $DOSS_HOME/policy.yaml
mkdir $DOSS_HOME/self/profile
cp address.md $DOSS_HOME/self/profile/address.md
cp dietary.md $DOSS_HOME/self/profile/dietary.md
cp missing.md $DOSS_HOME/self/profile/missing.md
cp access.yaml $DOSS_HOME/local/access.yaml

# The validator catches the missing rough value.
! exec $DOSS check --changed --quiet
stdout 'self/profile/missing.md.*E_ROUGH'

# The view still succeeds, but omits that fact instead of leaking the full body.
exec $DOSS view --for kordi:pedro --out view
stdout 'warning: 1 fact.*rough values are missing'
grep 'Toronto' view/self/profile/address.md
! grep '123 King St' view/self/profile/address.md
grep 'No cilantro' view/self/profile/dietary.md
! exists view/self/profile/missing.md
grep '"topic": "profile/missing"' view/manifest.json
grep '"path": "/tmp/project"' view/access.json
grep '"level": "read"' view/access.json

-- policy.yaml --
groups:
  friends:
    - kordi:pedro
can-see:
  friends:
    profile/address: rough
    profile/dietary: full
    profile/missing: rough

-- access.yaml --
grants:
  friends:
    /tmp/project: read

-- address.md --
---
rough: "Toronto"
---
123 King St W, Toronto.

-- dietary.md --
No cilantro.

-- missing.md --
This private detail has no rough value yet.
